◎简　　介  

　　In 2005, filmmaker Agnès Varda revisited the Rue Daguerre where she used to live 30 years earlier and had interviewed the shopkeepers for her film Daguerreotypes, to see how things might have changed. The same grocer was still there, and the accordion shop had been repainted a different color.
introduction: In 2005, filmmaker Agnès Varda revisited the Rue Daguerre where she used to live 30 years earlier and had interviewed the shopkeepers for her film Daguerreotypes, to see how things might have changed. The same grocer was still there, and the accordion shop had been repainted a different color.
